title: The Officers Use Energy Steroids
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7. The core beat is the officers use energy steroids.
scene: The scene follows the officers use energy steroids, keeping the focus on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A few hours ago - the ocean forest

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: outta my way!! I'm going to beat those guys up!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I keep telling you to wait!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just listen to what I have to say!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What relationship do you and I share?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: We're friends !!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: precisely. And it is that most natural of relations...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...that fish-man and human have failed to achieve for many long years!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: When I tell you not to fight hody....

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I meant that you must not do battle with him rashly! You must think before you act!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You must defeat him not as a violent human suppressing the fishermen...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: ...but as the hero of this island!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: A Hero?! forget it!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: What ?!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're Pirates!! I like heroes a lot, but I don't want to be one!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do you get what being a hero means?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I mean, think about meat!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: pirates eat meat and have big parties!! But heroes take meat and give it to poor people!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I want to eat meat!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What kind of logic is that...?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then I'll give you plenty of meat, so do as I say !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: All right!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It's that simple ?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Now, this is the plan in short.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm going to ask for you to save me. All you have to do is respond to my call for help.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: first of all, Megalo and I will get ourselves captured by the enemy...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Thus infuriating the plaza!! Once we arrive, I need somebody to sneak out from inside Megalo...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...locate the tenryubito letter and the key to the king's chains...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...and steal them from the enemy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Can any of you handle that?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Stealing is my specialty!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: with Robin's help, it should be easy enough!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: quite.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Good.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now, once we have released the King, that's when I will call for Luffy's help.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Luffy, if you appear from inside Megalo at that moment ...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ....everyone will understand that we all planned this together.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: princess, you can wait in a safe location outside the Plaza...

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: ...Ready to take the recovered letter and escape together with your father.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The rest of you should head to the Palace right away...

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: And rescue the captive straw hats from their plight.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Once they are safe, you can all head to the Plaza together.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As for how exactly to go about rescuing your crewmates...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: work it out your- selves.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What kind of plan is that?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: How do you think the watching citizens will react if we execute this plan?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Nyuuu... All the people of fish-man Island and the fish-man district have a healthy respect for you, jimbei.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yes... if they see that you've placed your life in Luffy- Chin's hands for the sake of rescuing the king...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: We shall call this operation ...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...I'm sure everyone will be cheering for Luffy- Chin!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm only agreeing to this because it's you, jimbei !!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't really want anybody cheering for me! It throws me off!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It doesn't really happen very often, does it?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: With all those beautiful mermaids cheering for me, I could defeat any demon Emperor!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...you have my gratitude!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Hmm ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: There's still something on your mind?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: WHO NEEDS A NAME?! Let's just go!!

summary: The Officers Use Energy Steroids. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
